title: Memorandum Order No. 636, s. 1979
text:
TANGGAPAN NG PANGULO NG PILIIINAS (OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES)

MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 636

The temporary detail and designation of the government personnel listed, hereunder, effective upon entrance to duty but not earlier than 16 December 1978, to constitute the Work Force of the Batasang Pambansa which shall provide the requisite technical, staff and clerical services for the Batasan, is hereby authorized:

DOCUMENTATION SERVICES

COMMITTEE SERVICE

She shall perform the duties and discharge the responsibilities of the position indicated opposite her name.

She shall be entitled to honoraria in the amount equivalent to fifty percent (50%) of her basic salary chargeable against the Batasan funds and subject to the usual accounting and auditing rules and regulations.

By Authority of the President: (SGD.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant

Manila, January 17, 1979

Source: Presidential Management Staff
